Private development · Founder validation phase

A long-term behavioural companion that learns, adapts, and grows more valuable over time.

Archie remembers your journey the way a person would. Not as data. As a relationship that deepens with every conversation.

Voice first
Always available

Discover Archie Investor enquiries
The problem

The industry solved information. It never solved consistency.

Millions of people know exactly what they should do. They fail anyway. Not because of ignorance, but because nobody notices when they stop. Nobody asks how they are. Nobody remembers where they struggled last month.

People do not fail because they lack information. They fail because nobody notices when they stop.

The gap every app ignores

Apps measure activity. They do not build relationships.

Every fitness product on the market tracks what you do. None of them remember who you are, what you told them last month, why this matters to you, or where you usually fall off. No two interactions connect. The user is invisible the moment they close the app.

What Archie does differently

Archie remembers the person behind the data.

Every conversation becomes part of a permanent, structured record that grows more valuable over time. Archie knows your history, your motivations, your setbacks and your milestones. The longer you use it, the better it understands you. No other product in this space works this way.

The founder

Built on necessity.

"I am currently 140kg. Archie will be the reason that changes. Every workout, every meal, every conversation will be documented. That is the proof of concept."

The founder

12

Month programme

100%

Documented

Day 1

Starting now

Real

Not simulated

Archie was not designed in a boardroom. It was designed in a changing room, by someone who did not know what to do with the weights, who signed up and quit, and who knew the missing piece was never information.

It was someone to notice. Someone to remember. Someone to still be there on the days you almost did not show up.

Before asking the public to trust this product, the founder will spend twelve months proving it works on himself. Every session, every meal, every conversation logged. The transformation becomes the evidence.

Voice first

Speak to Archie.
Anywhere. Any time.

Archie is not a form you fill in after a workout. It is not a dashboard you check before bed. It is a conversation that happens in the moments that matter, when your hands are on a barbell, when you are walking home, when you need someone to ask how things are going.

Voice is not a feature. It is the entire point. The interface disappears. The relationship remains.

In the gym

Log a set, ask about form, record a personal best, or tell Archie your shoulder is bothering you. All by voice, without putting down the weight.

Morning briefing

Archie tells you how you slept, what is on the plan today, and adjusts based on how you are actually feeling. Before you have even left the house.

On a walk, in the car, at home

Log a meal, talk through a tough week, ask Archie to pull up your progress. The conversation does not stop when you leave the gym.

Roadmap

Voice inside the app launches with Phase One. Voice outside the app, through earbuds, shortcuts and wearables, follows in Phase Two as the platform matures.

How Archie works

Five engines. One relationship.

Archie is not a single feature. It is an architecture designed to understand people, not just their data, and to grow more useful with every interaction.

Identity Engine

Archie builds an evolving picture of who you are.

Goals, preferences, communication style, lifestyle, schedule, relationships. This profile is never static. Every conversation refines it.

Memory Engine

Archie's greatest competitive advantage.

Structured long-term memory rather than conversation history. Weight, records, motivations, milestones, setbacks. Everything connected. The AI model is replaceable. The memory is not.

Decision Engine

Every recommendation is reasoned, not generated.

Archie combines sleep, training load, nutrition, mood and recovery before producing guidance. It always explains why, building trust rather than issuing instructions.

Behaviour Engine

Archie never responds like a generic AI assistant.

Every response passes through behavioural rules: understand before advising, listen for emotion before information, encourage before correcting, challenge without judging.

Conversation Engine

Conversation is the interface.

Voice-first. Natural speech. No forms, no dashboards to navigate. Users speak with Archie. Archie listens, thinks, and responds with increasing personalisation over time. Everything else is secondary to this.

The conversation

It responds to the person. Not the question.

When someone asks if they will ever lose the weight, the literal question is about nutrition. The real question is about confidence. Archie addresses what matters first.

The Memory Engine

Structured memory. Not conversation history.

Every memory carries importance, confidence, frequency and source. Archie knows what it knows with certainty, what it knows tentatively, and what it should ask again. Relationship milestones are permanent and never pruned.

Weekly compliance

87%

Strong week. Missing the evening magnesium twice is the only gap.

Morning stack

Creatine monohydrate

5g · With breakfast

The most researched supplement in sport. Increases phosphocreatine stores which fuels short bursts of high-intensity effort. At your training volume, 5g daily is optimal. No loading phase needed.

Strength Recovery Evidence: High

Vitamin D3 + K2

2000 IU + 100mcg · With food

UK latitude means most people are deficient, especially in winter. D3 supports immune function, testosterone levels and mood. K2 directs calcium to bones rather than arteries. Take together for best effect.

Immunity Hormones Evidence: High

Omega-3 fish oil

2 capsules (1000mg) · With breakfast

EPA and DHA reduce systemic inflammation, support joint health and improve cardiovascular markers. Particularly useful given the training volume and the shoulder. Take with food to avoid reflux.

Joints Inflammation Evidence: High

Evening stack

Magnesium glycinate

400mg · 1 hour before bed

Magnesium is involved in over 300 enzymatic reactions. Most people are deficient. Glycinate form is the most absorbable and gentle on the stomach. Improves sleep quality, reduces muscle cramps and supports recovery overnight. You mentioned poor sleep recently, this is the most direct intervention.

Sleep Recovery Evidence: High

Archie noticed you missed this twice this week. Sleep data shows a pattern. This one matters.

Zinc

25mg · With evening meal

Zinc supports testosterone production, immune function and protein synthesis. Athletes commonly deplete it through sweat. Take with food to avoid nausea. Do not take at the same time as calcium supplements.

Hormones Immunity Evidence: Medium

Creatine running low

Estimated 5 days remaining. Archie will remind you to reorder.

Archie

Morning stack has been consistent. The magnesium is the one to focus on this week. Your sleep data is telling me it matters more than you might think right now.

Improves at scale

Margin trajectory

Margin at every tier is meaningful from day one. AI provider costs reduce significantly at volume. The memory system that defines Archie costs the same whether a user has been active for one week or three years.

Development roadmap

Prove it first. Then scale.

Archie is being built with discipline. Every phase unlocks the next only after the previous has been validated in real-world use.

Phase One · Now

Founder Validation Programme

Twelve months of documented real-world use by the founder. Every workout, meal, conversation and setback becomes product validation data. Archie proves it changes behaviour before a single paying user is acquired.

In progress
Phase Two

Public Launch

Voice-first subscription platform launching only after the founder case study demonstrates measurable behavioural change. The public receives a product that has already been proven, not a beta test.

Following validation
Phase Three

Archie One

Archie begins with software. Archie One follows only after the software has been proven. A premium wearable designed to deepen Archie's understanding, not compete with existing smartwatches.

Post commercial validation
Phase Four

Platform Expansion

The same conversation, memory and behavioural architecture applied to healthcare, corporate wellbeing and clinical research. The knowledge domain changes. The core technology does not.

Long-term vision
Concept · Phase Three roadmap item Archie One

The first wearable built for an AI companion.

Archie One is not intended to compete with existing smartwatches. It is designed to exist specifically alongside Archie, continuously deepening its understanding of the user through biometric and activity data captured throughout the day.

Heart rate, HRV, sleep analysis, activity tracking, recovery metrics, daily readiness. Development begins only after the software platform has been validated commercially. The wearable enhances the experience. It is never required to use Archie.

Archie One is a concept design representing a future roadmap item. It is not currently in development. Renders shown are illustrative of design direction only.

Technology

Provider-agnostic. Relationship-native.

Archie does not depend on any single AI provider. The behaviour, memory, decision-making and relationship model are owned entirely by Archie. External providers supply AI models, speech recognition and infrastructure. As technology improves, Archie adopts it without rebuilding what matters.

What Archie owns

The Memory Architecture

Structured long-term memory with importance, confidence, frequency and source metadata on every stored fact. The memory system is Archie's primary intellectual property, not the AI model underneath it.

What Archie owns

The Behaviour Engine

A complete set of communication rules that define how Archie speaks, challenges, encourages and responds. These rules are independent of whichever language model powers the product at any given time.

The infrastructure

Built for scale from day one

Next.js progressive web application, Supabase database, Vercel hosting, OpenAI Whisper for voice transcription. Provider-agnostic AI layer supporting multiple model providers simultaneously.

The moat

Brains commoditise. Memory does not.

OpenAI, Anthropic and Google are building better models. Archie is building better memory. Switching the underlying AI model should feel like changing a car engine. Invisible to the driver.

The opportunity

The fitness industry has
never had a companion.
Until now.

Every app in this space was built by people who already knew what they were doing in the gym. Archie was built by someone who did not. That is the difference. That is the market nobody else is serving.

10.4M

UK gym members

None of them have a companion that remembers them. Every single one is a potential Archie user.

12 months

Before public launch

The founder validates the product on himself first. You invest in evidence, not a concept.

One shot

To be in at the start

Phase One investment is limited. The people who back Archie now are part of the story that gets told when it succeeds.

This is the beginning.
Be part of it.
